hero.tagline: 9+ years shipping production web apps — C#, .NET, React, and Azure. I like turning complex requirements into clean, maintainable code.

about.title: A bit about me
about.extraText: Outside of work I enjoy tinkering with new tech, which usually means starting a side project and spending way too long making it production-grade. I’m mild-mannered, have a good sense of humour, and genuinely enjoy pairing on hard problems.

contact.title: Let's connect
contact.description: Whether it’s a project, a role, or just a chat about tech — I’d love to hear from you.
